3018500.name: Broken Shell
3018500.description:
Help Mr. and Mrs. Hermit on their heartfelt journey to a better life. Solve puzzles, overcome challenges, and protect what you love.

Broken Shell is a cozy, hand-drawn puzzle adventure that takes players on an emotional journey with Mr. and Mrs. Hermit, a crab couple whose peaceful home has been devastated by human expansion. As they navigate love, loss, and hope, players will help them solve meaningful puzzles and overcome challenges to find a new home and rebuild their life together.

GAME FEATURES:

  • Story-Driven Experience: An emotional narrative about love, hope and protection, designed for players who enjoy meaningful storytelling.

  • Casual Gameplay: Simple point-and-click mechanics, perfect for players seeking a laid-back, accessible adventure.

  • Vibrant Art and Animation: Stunning underwater visuals paired with smooth, engaging animations that bring the world and characters to life.

  • Unique Indie Adventure: A personal, handcrafted journey offering something fresh and different from mainstream titles.

  • Family-Friendly Fun: Suitable for all ages, with a playful yet heartfelt tone that resonates with both kids and adults.

Foggy Studio is dedicated to crafting immersive animated adventure games that push boundaries. We poured our hearts into creating this game, and we hope you'll enjoy playing it as much as we enjoyed making it.
3018500.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
